name: @workspace/phoebe-mobile
description: Phoebe Mobile — Capacitor-wrapped native iOS shell around the mymonastery web app. Zero changes to mymonastery source; the mobile build composes mymonastery's production bundle into www/ and layers native features (push, haptics, biometrics, safe-area, keyboard, Sign in with Apple) on top.

scripts.build: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build:shell && pnpm run build:compose
scripts.ios: pnpm run build && pnpm run cap:sync && pnpm run cap:open
